title: Post-auth return dry-run
goal: Prove upload, studio, and auth-return route ownership through a public-safe dry-run bundle.

steps.name: Prepare synthetic upload
steps.expectation: The fixture exposes synthetic input without private files.

steps.name: Review studio state
steps.expectation: The fixture names a stable review surface.

steps.name: Return from authentication
steps.expectation: The fixture records only a synthetic state id.
